case_title: KERINS, MARTIN VS RUIMY, GEORGE MR.-OWNER IND.& DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUIMY, GEORGE MR.-OWNER IND.& DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KERINS, MARTIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RUIMY, GEORGE MR.-OWNER IND.& DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY PLAINTIFF TO RETURN WATCH TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT TO CREDIT PLAINTIFF'S CHARGE CARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $314.65 FILED BY KERINS, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT RUIMY, GEORGE MR.-OWNER IND.& DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RUIMY, GEORGE MR.-OWNER IND.& DBA GLAMOUR JEWELRY
